subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the capital of Rajasthan?
explanation_en: Jaipur is the capital of Rajasthan.
explanation_ar: Jaipur is the capital of Rajasthan.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the famous king of Chittor?
question_hi: चित्राणी कौन शायरलाइन के आकार किस्मत के एक प्रमोजन को खाते हैं।
explanation_en: Prithviraj Chauhan was a popular king of Chittor. He is also known as Prithviraj Chauhan.
explanation_hi: प्रतीर चौवा एक चित्राणी के एक प्रेतिर चौवा
explanation_ar: Prithviraj Chauhan was a famous king of Chittor. He is also known as Prithviraj Chauhan.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the founder of Chittor?
explanation_en: Raja Ravi Varman was the founder of Chittor. He established the city in 1557 CE.
explanation_hi: राजा रेवी वर्मण चित्राणी का संतुलय कर्मण
explanation_ar: Raja Ravi Varman was the founder of Chittor. He established the city in 1557 CE.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: When did Raja Ravi Varman establish Chittor?
question_hi: राजा रेवी वर्मण चित्राणी का संतुलय कर्मण
explanation_en: Raja Ravi Varman established Chittor in 1557 CE.
explanation_hi: राजा रेवी वर्मण चित्राणी का संतुलय कर्मण
explanation_ar: Raja Ravi Varman established Chittor in 1557 CE.

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the Rana of Mewar?
explanation_en: Rana Kumbha, also known as Rana Kumbha, was the Rana of Mewar. He was a famous Rajput king and played a vital role in the battle of Taragarh.
